name: Stir Fried Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a wok or wide frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and jalapeno; cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add beef strips to the pan and sauté until browned on all sides.
4. Remove beef with a slotted spoon and keep warm.
5. Add peppers, carrots, cauliflower, potato, and mushrooms to the same pan.
6. Cook vegetables until tender-crisp, about 5 minutes.
7. Return beef to the pan; cook for an additional 2 minutes or until meat is heated through.
8. Serve hot over flour tortillas.
